home.heroTitle: Everything about the TSL market on one map: companies, offers, and job announcements.
home.heroSubtitle: ContainerBoard explains the product from the first screen, then lets users jump to the full filtered map in one click.
home.whatSubtitle: Switch tabs without changing tools and immediately compare map data with the synchronized list.
home.whatPathSearchText: Click one option below and jump straight to the right view.
home.whatPathOfferText: Pick a publication type and add your listing in a few quick steps.
home.actionJobTitle: I am looking for a job
home.actionJobText: Open the job announcements tab and browse active positions.
home.actionCompaniesText: Review transport and logistics company profiles on the map.
home.actionOffersText: Browse transport and cooperation offers in one view.
home.actionLeadsTitle: I want to add a quote request
home.actionLeadsText: Go to quote requests and post a request for the market.
home.cardAnnouncementsText: Browse active postings and jump straight to applications.
home.cardOffersText: Compare transport and cooperation offers in one place.
home.cardCompaniesText: Find companies by location, operating area, and keywords.
home.cardLeadRequestsText: Filter freight requests and monitor your own quote requests.
home.previewSubtitle: The landing now shows only a focused companies map preview. Full filters and all tabs are available in the map module.
home.previewImageAlt: ContainerBoard companies map preview with marked locations
home.previewPanelText: Check TSL company profiles on the map, filter results, and move to contact faster.
home.previewPanelPointOne: Filter companies by location and operating area.
home.previewPanelPointThree: Open the company profile and take the next step immediately.
home.joinTitle: Join ContainerBoard and get visible on the TSL map
home.joinSubtitle: Create your company profile, publish offers and job posts, and reach new clients and candidates in one place.
home.joinPointOne: You add your company, we handle promotion across the ContainerBoard ecosystem.
home.joinPointTwo: You publish offers and job posts, we deliver relevant traffic from the TSL market.
home.joinPointThree: You focus on talks and sales, we simplify reaching clients and candidates.
home.stepOneText: Decide whether to browse companies, offers, announcements, or quote requests.
home.stepTwoText: Narrow results by keyword, location, distance, and additional filters.
home.stepThreeText: Open details and take the next business step immediately.
home.faqOneQuestion: Do I need an account to browse the map?
home.faqOneAnswer: No. The map and filters are available without login.
home.faqTwoAnswer: An account is required for publishing entries, managing companies, and user actions.
home.faqThreeQuestion: Can I jump directly to the full map?
home.faqThreeAnswer: Yes. Click "Open map" to go to /maps.
home.trustedSubtitle: TSL companies that publish and grow their business network through ContainerBoard.
home.finalTitle: Ready to explore the market live?
home.finalSubtitle: Open the full map and work on real-time filtered data.

footer.copyright: © 2026 ContainerBoard. Built with passion for logistics. All rights reserved.

common.rateLimitRetry: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds} s.
common.rateLimitWait: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains how ContainerBoard processes personal data and protects user privacy.
privacy.pointOne: We process account data (name, email, password hash) to provide authentication and platform access.
privacy.pointTwo: Data can be used to contact users about account security, verification and operational notices.
privacy.pointThree: Users can request update or deletion of personal data by contacting administration.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms define rules of using the ContainerBoard platform and user responsibilities.
terms.pointOne: Users are responsible for accuracy and legality of published content.
terms.pointTwo: ContainerBoard may suspend or delete content violating law or platform rules.
terms.pointThree: The platform can change features and rules with notice published on the website.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: ContainerBoard uses cookies and local storage to keep language preferences, sessions and a smooth user experience.
cookies.pointOne: Essential cookies are required for login and secure platform operation.
cookies.pointTwo: Preference storage is used to remember language and cookie notice acceptance.
cookies.pointThree: Users can delete cookies at any time in browser settings.

about.title: About us
about.intro: ContainerBoard is built for companies and buyers who want to find, sell, or rent containers faster.
about.body:
We bring container offers into one clear place, reducing outdated listings, unnecessary calls, and manual searching across many sources.

The platform helps sellers publish stock in a simple way, while buyers can compare available containers by location, type, condition, and price.

We develop ContainerBoard around the real needs of the container market: easy offer publishing, practical search, lead handling, and operational support when it is needed.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: This section will include the current ways to contact the ContainerBoard team.
contact.pointOne: We will add direct contact details for support and business cooperation.
contact.pointTwo: You will see clear guidance on which channel to use for technical and commercial topics.
contact.pointThree: We will also share expected response times and support scope.

privacySections.title: 1. General information
items: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data of users of the ContainerBoard platform available at containerboard.pl is processed.
The data controller is ContainerBoard Karol Tyminski 5842785961, registered in Gdansk, Andrzeja Struga 4, email: hello@containerboard.pl.
We care about user privacy and the security of processed data.

privacySections.title: 2. Scope of collected data
paragraphs: Depending on how you use the platform, we may process:

subsections.title: 2.1 Data provided voluntarily
items: full name,
email address,
phone number,
company details such as name, address and tax number,
content published on the platform, including offers, announcements and descriptions.

subsections.title: 2.2 Data collected automatically
items: IP address,
browser and device data,
information about activity on the website.

privacySections.title: 3. Purposes of processing
paragraphs: Data is processed in order to:
items: provide services available on the platform,
enable publishing and browsing content,
enable contact between users,
ensure security and prevent abuse,
analyze and improve platform performance.

privacySections.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: Data is processed on the basis of:
items: Article 6(1)(b) GDPR - service performance,
Article 6(1)(f) GDPR - legitimate interest such as security and platform development,
Article 6(1)(a) GDPR - consent, where applicable.

privacySections.title: 5. Data sharing
items: Data may be shared with other users, for example contact details visible in listings, and with technical service providers such as hosting or analytics partners.
Data is not sold to third parties.

privacySections.title: 6. Data retention
items: Data is stored for the period of using the platform, the time necessary to fulfill processing purposes, and any additional period required by law.
After that time, data may be deleted or anonymized.

privacySections.title: 7. User rights
items: access their data,
rectify it,
erase it,
restrict processing,
object to processing,
data portability,
lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

privacySections.title: 8. Data security
items: We use technical and organizational measures to protect data.
Only authorized persons have access to data.

privacySections.title: 9. Cookies
items: The platform uses cookies.
Detailed information is available in the Cookie Policy.

privacySections.title: 10. Changes to this Privacy Policy
items: This Privacy Policy may be updated.
A new version applies from the moment it is published on the website.

termsSections.title: 1. General provisions
items: These Terms define the rules for using the ContainerBoard platform available at containerboard.pl.
The platform is operated by ContainerBoard Karol Tyminski 5842785961, registered in Gdansk, Andrzeja Struga 4.
ContainerBoard allows users to browse container market company profiles, publish and review offers, and communicate around listings.
Using the platform means accepting these Terms.

termsSections.title: 2. Definitions
items: Platform - the ContainerBoard website.
User - any person using the Platform.
Content - any information published by the User, including descriptions, offers, company details and listings.
Operator - the owner and administrator of the Platform.

termsSections.title: 3. Rules of use
items: Users must use the Platform in accordance with applicable law and these Terms.
It is forbidden to publish content that is unlawful, infringes third-party rights, is misleading or contains spam.
Users must provide truthful and up-to-date information.

termsSections.title: 4. Publishing content
items: Users bear full responsibility for content published on the Platform.
By publishing content, users declare that they have the necessary rights, that the content is lawful and does not infringe third-party rights.
The Operator is not obliged to verify content before publication.
The Operator reserves the right to remove content that violates these Terms or the law, make technical edits and block user accounts.

termsSections.title: 5. Nature of the platform
items: ContainerBoard is an informational and intermediary platform.
The Operator is not a party to agreements concluded between users.
The platform does not guarantee the effectiveness of offers, service quality or user reliability.
All relationships between users are entered into at their own risk.

termsSections.title: 6. Liability
items: The Operator is not liable for content published by users, their actions or omissions, or any damage resulting from using the Platform.
The Operator does not guarantee uninterrupted operation of the Platform or the absence of technical errors.
The Platform may be temporarily unavailable for technical or development reasons.

termsSections.title: 7. Changes to the platform and Terms
items: The Operator reserves the right to change platform functionality, introduce new services and modify these Terms.
Changes to the Terms take effect once published on the Platform.

termsSections.title: 8. Access termination
items: The Operator may limit or block access to the Platform in case of a breach of these Terms.
Users may stop using the Platform at any time.

termsSections.title: 9. Final provisions
items: These Terms are governed by Polish law.
Any disputes will be resolved by the competent court.
Operator contact: hello@containerboard.pl.

cookiesSections.title: 1. General information
items: This Cookie Policy explains how cookies are used on the ContainerBoard platform available at containerboard.pl.
The data administrator is ContainerBoard Karol Tyminski 5842785961, email: hello@containerboard.pl.
The platform uses only essential cookies required for proper operation.

cookiesSections.title: 2. What cookies are
items: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device.
They support proper website operation and remembering basic user settings.

cookiesSections.title: 3. Which cookies we use
paragraphs: ContainerBoard uses only essential cookies, especially to:
items: maintain the user session,
ensure forms work correctly,
provide security, for example protection against abuse,
remember basic technical settings.
cookiesSections.outro: These cookies are not used for user tracking or marketing purposes.

cookiesSections.title: 4. Third-party cookies
items: The platform does not use third-party marketing or analytics cookies.
If such tools are introduced in the future, this policy will be updated accordingly.

cookiesSections.title: 5. Managing cookies
items: Users can manage cookies through their browser settings.
Restricting cookies may affect some platform features.

cookiesSections.title: 6. Changes to this Cookie Policy
items: This Cookie Policy may be updated.
A new version applies from the moment it is published on the website.

landingPage.metaTitle: Selling and buying containers in one place
landingPage.metaDescription: Publish container sale and rental offers, browse the latest listings and reach buyers faster.
landingPage.heroSubtitle: Browse offers from across Europe or add your own and receive inquiries directly.

heroValuePoints.title: No middlemen
heroValuePoints.text: You contact the listing owner directly

heroValuePoints.title: Offers from across Europe
heroValuePoints.text: One place instead of groups and emails

heroValuePoints.title: Single units and bulk
heroValuePoints.text: From one unit to larger volumes

landingPage.latestDescription: Open the full list to filter, sort and categorize containers.
landingPage.latestEmptyText: There are no active publications yet. The first listing can immediately make your offer visible on the board.
landingPage.workflowTitle: Adding a container takes about a minute
landingPage.workflowDescription: The form guides you through predefined fields, so you can publish a single offer quickly or add many containers at once.

workflowSteps.title: Fill in the form in a minute
workflowSteps.text: Many fields are predefined, so you only complete the most important offer details.

workflowSteps.title: Add the key offer details
workflowSteps.text: Price, condition, location and photos are enough to make the listing clear and comparable.

workflowSteps.title: Add many containers at once
workflowSteps.text: For larger volumes, you can use import workflows and publish multiple items in one pass.

landingPage.conciergeDescription: We support teams that want to delegate listing publication, stock management, transport coordination and full concierge support.

conciergeServices.title: Listing operations
conciergeServices.text: We can take over publication and prepare listings based on your materials.

conciergeServices.title: Stock management
conciergeServices.text: We help organize your offer base, refresh entries and keep stock data current.

conciergeServices.title: Transport coordination
conciergeServices.text: We can support transport and coordinate the operational side of delivery.

conciergeServices.title: Full concierge
conciergeServices.text: From publication to inquiry handling and next commercial steps, we can run the whole process.

landingPage.finalTitle: Browse current offers or add your own listing
landingPage.finalDescription: Open the board to browse containers, or publish an offer and start receiving inquiries right after it goes live.

notFoundPage.title: We could not find the page you are looking for.
notFoundPage.description: That container has already left, but we still have others. Go back to the listings and see what is currently available.

inquiryForm.modalSubtitle: Fill in the form and send your inquiry to the listing owner.
inquiryForm.robotCheck: Please confirm you are not a robot.

jobs.heroDescription: These pages are prepared for searches like jobs warsaw, forwarding poznan or dispatcher krakow. Each landing shows current announcements from the city area and nearby.

myListings.title: My containers

myListings.refreshDialogText: Check quantity and price before extending.
myListings.deleteDialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete the listing?
myListings.bulkChooseTitle: What do you want to do?
myListings.bulkChooseDescription: Choose how to add listings: self-service Multi Import or a Concierge request.
myListings.bulkSelfDescription: Download the Excel template, complete the rows and upload an XLSX or XLS file. The Dictionary sheet contains all allowed values. Yellow columns are required, and location is one text field. Maximum 250 rows per import. Multi Import creates sale offers only. If you run into any issues, contact us and we will be happy to help.
myListings.conciergeDescription: Prefer us to do it for you? No problem. Send your stock in any format and we will prepare and publish the listings.
myListings.conciergeNotePlaceholder: E.g. file format, priority, pricing or availability notes
myListings.bulkNoCompanyLineOne: Create a company profile to use Multi Import.
myListings.bulkNoCompanyLineTwo: You can use our prepared Excel file.
myListings.bulkNoCompanyConcierge: Send us a file in any format and we will do it for you.
